---
title: 'Character Sketch: Theron Ashlund'
date: '2014-10-26T07:07:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '5565194184890085726'
blogger_filename: '/2014/10/character-sketch-theron-ashlund.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Character Sketch'
  - 'White Noise'
---

<br />
Character Sketch Template (<a href="https://www.udemy.com/blog/character-sketch-examples/" target="_blank">Hints</a>)<br />
<div style="padding-left: 30px;">
<br /></div>
<div style="padding-left: 30px;">
Photos: </div>
<div style="padding-left: 30px;">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/leather-jacket-a0e4eb5ec560.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/leather-jacket-a0e4eb5ec560.jpg" height="320" width="238" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://www.pinterest.com/pin/471048442249349638/" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img alt="" border="0" src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEjbX6THzGWl8pHWGVIDOECIFY3Ha_GWU2CY0uuEMFGbY1uXgklk6tOYyOXeGMxmio_sJoQBZpbZ5Mq1uBFXZ4gE0qfTgSlT5zRG511lGQ4A36FGBSEVnffFKl4gY3EP6kBYp6mCOc-c_zL9/s1600/it's%2Bnot%2Bscience%2Bfiction.jpg" height="320" width="214" /></a></div>
<br /></div>
<h3>
Theron Ashlund</h3>
<h4>
Captain Theron "Ash" Ashlund, USAF Spec Ops. </h4>
<h4>
</h4>
<div style="padding-left: 30px;">
Overview: <a href="http://www.fiction-writers-mentor.com/list-of-character-traits.html" target="_blank">Traits</a>, <a href="http://www.strengthstest.com/strengthsfinderthemes/strengths-themes.html" target="_blank">Strengths</a>, <a href="http://www.strengthdeployment.com/" target="_blank">SDI</a>, <a href="http://www.16personalities.com/personality-types" target="_blank">Type</a>, <a href="http://www.16personalities.com/articles/our-theory" target="_blank">TypeTheory</a>, Gifts, Talents, Skills</div>
<div style="padding-left: 30px;">
<br />
Introvert, obServant, Thinker, Prospector, (<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/istp-personality" target="_blank">ISTP</a>) | </div>
<div style="padding-left: 30px;">
<br /></div>
<div style="padding-left: 30px;">
<br /></div>
<div style="padding-left: 30px;">
<br /></div>
<div style="padding-left: 30px;">
I. Physical Description</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
A. Hair</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. Brown Hair, High &amp; Tight, slightly longer on top.&nbsp;</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
B. Eyes</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1.Brown,&nbsp;20/10&nbsp;better than perfect&nbsp;vision, <br />
C. Height/Weight</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. 170 lbs, fit, works out daily out of habit from special forces training.&nbsp;</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
D. Style of Dress</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. When a civilian, he wears blue or black jeans, white or black t-shirts, and a black leather jacket. Also wears black fedora, and dark sunglassess that hide his eyes, even at dusk. </div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. When in military settings he wears combat or military dress uniforms.</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
3. When in the Experiment, wears a white, tight, jump suit. </div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
E. Speech</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. ?????</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. certain words or phrases??</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
F. How Character Feels About Physical Appearance</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. Innocuous, blend in to the crowd, disappear, but look a little cool while doing it. </div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. His ways are set, until he is forced into hiding, when he must make changes to his look. </div>
<div style="padding-left: 30px;">
II. Personality</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
A. Mannerisms?</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. certain little thing the character likes to do, like tearing up napkins while waiting for food at a restaurant</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. another certain little thing the character likes to do</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
B. Bad Habits</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. Bad Habit 1</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. Bad Habit 2</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
C. <a href="http://www.16personalities.com/istp-strengths-and-weaknesses" target="_blank">Strengths/Weaknesses</a></div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. Optimistic, Energetic, Relaxed, Good in Crises, Both spontaneous and rational. </div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. Stubborn, Private, Reserved, Insensitive, Too Many Risks, Bored Easily</div>
<div style="padding-left: 30px;">
III. Likes/Dislikes</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
A. Likes</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. Like 1</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. Like 2</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
B. Dislikes</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. Dislike 1</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. Dislike 2</div>
<div style="padding-left: 30px;">
IV. Family</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
A. Parents</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. mom</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. dad</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
B. Siblings</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. sibling 1</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. sibling 2</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
C. Extended Family</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. extended family member 1</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. extended family member 2</div>
<div style="padding-left: 30px;">
V. Hobbies</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
A. Hobby 1</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. details about hobby</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. characterâ€™s feelings about hobby</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
B. Hobby 2</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. details about hobby</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. characterâ€™s feelings about hobby</div>
<div style="padding-left: 30px;">
VI. History</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
A. Childhood</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. event</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. event</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
3. characterâ€™s feelings about childhood</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
B. Teen Years</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. event</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. event</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
3. characterâ€™s feelings about teen years</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
C. Young Adulthood</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. event</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. event</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
3. characterâ€™s feelings about young adulthood</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
D. Just Before the Story Begins</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
1. event</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
2. event</div>
<div style="padding-left: 90px;">
3. characterâ€™s feelings about events</div>
<div style="padding-left: 30px;">
VII. Conflicts</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
A. Inner Conflicts</div>
<div style="padding-left: 60px;">
B. Outer Conflicts</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://www.examiner.com/article/the-scarlet-beret-the-road-less-taken" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/air-drop-2-d4524f8133b0.jpg" height="208" width="320" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://www.pinterest.com/PJBlue12/military/" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/air-drop-75bbfed37f3e.jpg" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://www.americanspecialops.com/usaf-special-operations/combat-controllers/" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/combat-controllers-d84e83da68f9.jpg" height="213" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://christi-snow.com/when-the-mission-ends-trilogy/" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/usaf-03673e7de894.jpg" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="https://josephmallozzi.wordpress.com/2014/06/" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/spock-3d-chess-17b7d2975a80.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
******<br />
<br />
Thank you for reading. I hope you enjoyed this. I'd love to make a community with this project. If you would like to add, comment on, critique, or otherwise participate... that would be great!<br />
<br />
Please include any information about yourself, your blog/wesbite/amazon author page that you want to share with the community also.<br />
<br />
<i>* I may include "Affiliate Links" which means I earn a commission when you buy products I link to. To see my full about page and disclosures: <a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/what-is-this.html" target="_blank">Click Here</a></i><br />
<br />
<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">It's Author Fun</a>&nbsp;By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a><br />
<br />
To Subscribe to the <a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/AuthorFun" target="_blank">RSS: Click Here</a><br />
<br />
For Non-Fiction writing by <a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/" target="_blank">Darrell G. Wolfe: Click Here</a><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
